additional_metadata.organizer: Reinaldo Calcaño & Milan Mosny with Infostrux

events.agenda: 5:30-6:00 Check in/Registration; 6:00-6:05 Welcome Remarks; 6:05-6:30 Presentation 1 + Q&A; 7:00-7:30 Presentation 2 + Q&A; 7:45-7:50 Closing Remarks; 7:50-8:00 Call for speakers.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt; however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Talk Shop Media, 1498 W 5th Ave, Vancouver, BC
events.raw_text:
Tue, Aug 22, 2023 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM PDT

Presentation 1: Intro to dbt and dbt best practices (Milan Mosny, CTO, Infostrux)
Presentation 2: Building Dimensional Models with dbt: What works well and where there's room for improvement (Matt Helm, Materialize)

talks.description: An introduction to dbt and dbt best practices.

talks.title: Intro to dbt and dbt Best Practices

talks.description: Building dimensional models with dbt, covering what works well and where there's room for improvement.
